methodsAttempted.notes: Probed 8 seed URLs. All returned HTTP 200. HUIT /ai landing page rejected as too thin; other 7 seed URLs yielded substantive content.
Web search provider unavailable. Used opencli google search as fallback — returned no results for this query.
opencli google search returned 10 results. Relevant policy sources: HGSE AI Policy, OUE Generative AI Guidance, Provost letter (already seeded), ChatGPT Edu (rejected).

methodsAttempted.query: Harvard University AI tools teaching guidance
methodsAttempted.notes: opencli google search returned no results for this broader query.
opencli google search returned 10 results. Relevant: OAISC FAS page, Bok Center faculty guidance, HMS ARI page. Extension School page rejected (too general).

summary: Discovered 12 verified source candidates and 3 rejections for Harvard University. University-wide policy layer is well-covered: HUIT guidelines (data privacy, approved tools, AI assistants), Provost letter (initial university-wide guidance), and Harvard.edu central resources. School-level policies found for HGSE (formal student AI policy AY2025-2026) and HMS (IT guidance + research integrity hub). FAS teaching guidance well-represented via OUE sample policies, Bok Center syllabus/faculty guidance, and OAISC resource hub. Harvard.edu learning resources noted as advisory only. Web search was partially available via opencli; 2 of 4 queries returned results. No blockers encountered — all seed URLs were accessible.
